name: Team Stanton
subject: It's long past time we have meaningful campaign finance reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

We all have different views, but we can agree that honoring our democratic process and the will of the people is of the utmost importance. One of the easiest ways that the will of the people is distorted is with dark money, or undisclosed (and sometimes suspicious) large amounts of corporate funding. **[Will you join me in signing this petition to demand that we once again require regulated limits on political campaign spending, so we can prioritize what everyday Americans want, not the elite donor class?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QokTd2yilp0lTlYX_GlVVwAksq0P0Pf5Bx-NmgRJCZ4=/0U2OFkS67SQkVnwo82dJJD1YiR2pzD2PxBhz5gGY3XQ=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/11-CU-anniversary-Stanton-AB)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QokTd2yilp0lTlYX_GlVVwAksq0P0Pf5Bx-NmgRJCZ4=/0U2OFkS67SQkVnwo82dJJD1YiR2pzD2PxBhz5gGY3XQ=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/11-CU-anniversary-Stanton-AB)

If this past election cycle taught us anything, it's that our democracy is fragile, and must be cared for. Ending Citizens United is a long overdue, but necessary first step in healing and strengthening our great democracy, and [**I thank you for doing your part to care for our country 's institutions and values**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QokTd2yilp0lTlYX_GlVVwAksq0P0Pf5Bx-NmgRJCZ4=/0U2OFkS67SQkVnwo82dJJD1YiR2pzD2PxBhz5gGY3XQ=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/11-CU-anniversary-Stanton-AB).

Thank you for your support,

\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/QokTd2yilp0lTlYX_GlVVwAksq0P0Pf5Bx-NmgRJCZ4=/UaOxwDvZA3c0eyXM-Z-L8H6_WdPgGw0b8n5I8Zd8kac=).

| Patriots,
Joe Biden stepped into the Oval Office for the first time with aggressive far-left goals. His administration showed their true colors by taking action on a number of progressive policies:

* Fast-tracked citizenship for 11 million or more illegal immigrants
* Ending construction of the border wall
* Rejoining the Paris Climate Accord and the World Health Organization
* Stopping the Keystone Pipeline

We need to stop these progressive and dangerous executive orders and PUT AMERICANS FIRST! Can I count on you to stand with me today?

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update | 1.25.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3869)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | FIRST, THE GOOD NEWS

---
| |
First, the good news.

You are reading this update, which means you still care about election integrity, as does most of America. The only way to make this situation better is to work our way out of it - and there is much work to be done. Keep the faith, my friend. And keep reading, so you know what we are facing ...

We are only just beginning to see the changes the Pelosi/Schumer Congress has in store for America's elections. The [first bill out of the gate in the 117th Session is HR-1,](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjElMkZ0ZXh0JTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMmhyMSUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnIlM0QxJTI2cyUzRDI=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3880) an election-focused bill that seeks to federalize elections and force states to adopt things like same-day registration, establishes mass mail ballots, cripples state voter ID standards, limits voter roll maintenance, and expands voter harvesting (_which, for the record, we are going to begin referring to as**vote trafficking,** because that's what it is. It's the predatory practice of exploiting vulnerable communities and stealing their free and fair vote. Vote Trafficking)_

As you would expect, opinions on this bill range widely, from leftist groups like Indivisible. They want the bill to pass because, as they write in their bill summary, they've seen "...[how hard Republicans are working to suppress the vote, specifically to disenfranchise Black people and people of color. "](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZpbmRpdmlzaWJsZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZSUyRmhyLTEtc3RyZW5ndGhlbmluZy1vdXItZGVtb2NyYWN5&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3881) It's actually hard even to copy/paste that line into this message when we all know how totally untrue it is, but it is what is being written and it's important you know that. Wall Street Journal's Kim Strassel is no fan of the bill, as evidenced from the headline of her article about HR-1, ["Harvesting the 2020 Election"](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cud3NqLmNvbSUyRmFydGljbGVzJTJGaGFydmVzdGluZy10aGUtMjAyMC1lbGVjdGlvbi0xMTYwNTIyMTk3NCUzRnJlZmxpbmslM0RkZXNrdG9wd2Vic2hhcmVfcGVybWFsaW5r&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3882).

This bill was first introduced during the 116th Session, (2019-2020) when it was also called HR-1. At that time, the[ Heritage Foundation put together a really good summary.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnJTJGZWxlY3Rpb24taW50ZWdyaXR5JTJGcmVwb3J0JTJGdGhlLWZhY3RzLWFib3V0LWhyLTEtdGhlLXRoZS1wZW9wbGUtYWN0LTIwMTklMjM=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3883) This session's bill isn't identical, but nonetheless these links will give you a good sense of what we're dealing with.

So, what does this mean? Is election integrity at its end? Is it a fait accompli? No. The arrows in our quiver are state sovereignty and personal liberty. Check out what your state legislators are proposing for election reform because if your state legislature is in session you can be certain it's on their radar. And get ready to roll up your sleeves and help us clean up the rolls. That's right, we are bringing back the research database you may remember from years ago. Our launch ETA is March 1. And that's just the beginning of what we have planned.

Ever onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
---
| |
---
|
---
| | TTV NEWS
---
| | WELCOME TO THE TRUE THE VOTE TEAM, MAUREEN RIORDAN

There are innumerable election-related legal battles on the horizon. It is with that in mind that True the Vote proudly announces our newest team member Maureen Riordan.

Ms. Riordan just retired from the Department of Justice most recently serving as a Senior Counsel to the Attorney General for Civil Rights. She joined the Department of Justice in 2000 and served as a senior trial attorney in the Voting Section specializing in voting rights litigation, including the enforcement of the Voting Rights Act, the Help America Vote Act, the National Voter Registration Act, and the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act.

Prior to her career at the Department of Justice, Ms. Riordan served as an Assistant District Attorney in New York where she was a member of the Homicide Bureau and Chief of the Special Victims Bureau. Ms. Riordan is very excited to be joining True the Vote. She hopes to spearhead a robust national voter list maintenance initiative along with other voting integrity initiatives. She intends to use her vast knowledge of voting rights enforcement and investigative skills to all of True the Vote’s work moving forward.

Ms. Riordan has been a licensed attorney in the State of NY since 1985.

* * *

THE LATEST CHAPTER IN THE GEORGIA CHALLENGES

Those looking to increase Washington’s power over our republic never waste a crisis. With many Americans raising questions about the credibility of the 2020 elections, some in our nation’s capital see an opportunity to fast track the federalization of our elections. True the Vote is fighting back to preserve the constitutional rights of states and citizens to run their elections.It’s a continuation of the important work we did in Georgia during the U.S. Senate runoffs that captured the entire nation’s attention.
Our Georgia Citizen Challenge Project put the question of voters’ rights front and center. Georgia law allows voters to challenge the eligibility of voters to cast ballots in a certain election, with county election boards having the final say. TTV partnered with voters throughout the state to challenge the eligibility of 364,000 people on the voters who records show have moved away from the address where they are registered.
Some counties took the challenges seriously, but most didn’t want to do the hard work that maintaining election integrity requires, so they either disregarded or dismissed them. Only a handful of counties, most of them with small populations, took up the challenges, setting a precedent for the future.
What we now know is that 20,000 unqualified voters did, in fact, vote in the January 5th election. The fact that 344,000 of the voters we flagged did not vote tells us one of several things - either they never intended to vote or were deterred from cheating, but in any case, the fact that the voter rolls are so inaccurate should alarm us all.
It’s this kind of lawlessness that undermines faith in election integrity - and it’s why we must continue our battle against the perpetrators and enablers of this broken status quo.
The courageous voters who brought these challenges in Georgia faced [hostile treatment](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ2aWRlby1qYWNrc29uLWNvdW50eS1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLXJlamVjdHMtY2FsbC10by12ZXJpZnktcHJvYmxlbWF0aWMtdm90ZXItYWRkcmVzc2VzJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3884) and even [harassment](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZnYS1jaGFsbGVuZ2Vycy1zdGFuZC1maXJtLWFnYWluc3QtYXR0YWNrcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3885) from some county election boards and violent threats from others. A few received notice that they, along with True the Vote, were being sued by Stacey Abrams’ group Fair Fight Action
Fair Fight Action’s litigation attempted to intimidate and silence TTV and the citizens it partnered with. Its lawsuit asked a federal court to stop the voter challenges, withdraw the challenges already submitted and to ban TTV from ever working in Georgia again. The facts in the case were clear, and the court ruled quickly. Fair Fight Action’s scare tactics lost. Justice won.
**But it’s not over.....** TTV couldn’t let Fair Fight Action’s attempt to intimidate voters go unchallenged. [We have now countersued in pursuit of a ruling to prevent Fair Fight Action from ever bullying and attempting to violate the rights of citizens again](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=364A858A20A3870). Citizens have a right to petition their government and to do so without harassment. Our countersuit will bear this out.
In the weeks and months ahead, the assaults on our rights and prerogatives will continue. There is a path ahead, but it requires vision, strength and perseverance - and we will bring them all to this battle!

There is still a great deal more yet to be done in the fight for the vote.

You can be a part of the process along with True the Vote. Just staying informed as citizen by receiving all our news and updates, you'll be helping to ensure the health of our system.

You can be an integral part of citizen-led efforts to ensure the integrity of your local ballot process. And with new apps and new ways to help right in your own backyard, you'll have phenomenal tools to get the job done right.

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | FIRST, THE GOOD NEWS | | First, the good news. You are reading this update, which means you still care about election integrity, as does most of America. The only way to make this situation better is to work our way out of it - and there is much work to be done. Keep the faith, my friend. And keep reading, so you know what we are facing ... We are only just beginning to see the changes the Pelosi/Schumer Congress has in store for America's elections. The an election-focused bill that seeks to federalize elections and force states to adopt things like same-day registration, establishes mass mail ballots, cripples state voter ID standards, limits voter roll maintenance, and expands voter harvesting (which, for the record, we are going to begin referring to asvote trafficking, because that's what it is. It's the predatory practice of exploiting vulnerable communities and stealing their free and fair vote. Vote Trafficking) As you would expect, opinions on this bill range widely, from leftist groups like Indivisible. They want the bill to pass because, as they write in their bill summary, they've seen "... It's actually hard even to copy/paste that line into this message when we all know how totally untrue it is, but it is what is being written and it's important you know that. Wall Street Journal's Kim Strassel is no fan of the bill, as evidenced from the headline of her article about HR-1, . This bill was first introduced during the 116th Session, (2019-2020) when it was also called HR-1. At that time, the This session's bill isn't identical, but nonetheless these links will give you a good sense of what we're dealing with. So, what does this mean? Is election integrity at its end? Is it a fait accompli? No. The arrows in our quiver are state sovereignty and personal liberty. Check out what your state legislators are proposing for election reform because if your state legislature is in session you can be certain it's on their radar. And get ready to roll up your sleeves and help us clean up the rolls. That's right, we are bringing back the research database you may remember from years ago. Our launch ETA is March 1. And that's just the beginning of what we have planned. Ever onward, | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote | | | | | TTV NEWS | | WELCOME TO THE TRUE THE VOTE TEAM, MAUREEN RIORDAN There are innumerable election-related legal battles on the horizon. It is with that in mind that True the Vote proudly announces our newest team member Maureen Riordan. Ms. Riordan just retired from the Department of Justice most recently serving as a Senior Counsel to the Attorney General for Civil Rights. She joined the Department of Justice in 2000 and served as a senior trial attorney in the Voting Section specializing in voting rights litigation, including the enforcement of the Voting Rights Act, the Help America Vote Act, the National Voter Registration Act, and the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act. Prior to her career at the Department of Justice, Ms. Riordan served as an Assistant District Attorney in New York where she was a member of the Homicide Bureau and Chief of the Special Victims Bureau. Ms. Riordan is very excited to be joining True the Vote. She hopes to spearhead a robust national voter list maintenance initiative along with other voting integrity initiatives. Dear Peter,
When conservatives across Missouri and our country saw what happened in our most recent elections - and the political class’s reluctance to give their own voters a hearing - I objected to the certification of the electoral college votes in Pennsylvania, despite pressure from both Democrats and Republicans.

Pennsylvania wasn’t following their own state’s election law, but the establishment didn’t want to hear it. But that’s not who I work for. **I objected because I wanted to make sure your voice was heard.**

**_Now, Biden and his woke mob are coming after me._I need your help.__**
[**DONATE $5 _NOW_ TO HELP ME FIGHT**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0578d7a273374dc6bb2eaede80a5519c&_e=T-njaDN68worJloO9vVatAihWzcAgroh_9oWIPqGbn2_lX9F3oCg8JfFtowN24-Qzq0I5Zj3HdXNmhDAKIQS_kW0_pCAs5hXnDIUEhyW5JDeBki844MbGKGaPjS2GhRPaNVrpAHizeO_gOTNOarW7tCMRKWEoT8ZvXhx-JRKhxos_JUT_mGuLOhZkkTWfHtMtkTI7Wo0OXRp9j-yvZi9yZg901iMO8MSu3gN__GRrMfdwv4Z-nln1jc2t6JGHva8I9kbDLMYNQdPDRn5m2BZ7Lei6UTtKEnPqkVnF8ADiwxvVgUsVsYv88Y0fspCD5Qf9dZSuREpmzgqRXhDlGxnqRlG3SoYwR_JOH8YhMsjptWH92Ge-tWEW4n13H27Fe_e1v5ETysdDIMGaSI_fDlUqP5m6do6kkHlmkYpPCRvvIM%3D)

Before Biden even took office, he shamefully targeted me for voicing my concerns by comparing me to a Nazi. He went even farther saying I should be “flat beaten.” Talking heads in the media were also calling for my resignation, and “keyboard warriors” on Twitter were calling me a terrorist.

Well, I have a message for them and for every special interest that wants me to shut up and ignore the truth: **I will not back down.**

I ran for Senate with a promise to protect American values, not corporate greed or woke mobs. The challenges we face won’t be easy, but we have something more important than special interests or Hollywood cash - we have a desire to protect our future.

_**If we do not stand up to the radical left we will get four years of lies, censorship, and America-last policies.**_
[**_Stop the radicals_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0578d7a273374dc6bb2eaede80a5519c&_e=T-njaDN68worJloO9vVatAihWzcAgroh_9oWIPqGbn2_lX9F3oCg8JfFtowN24-Qzq0I5Zj3HdXNmhDAKIQS_v95IAJw4xfG3N4jwc796sY6qBGmog4qSYS_nrJPoEtP3X-TCjx1pDrA9i-uFJM46bKLNsR6SXJrUVkB6nu2AU_cuZeuuz33vBDF-ifdDGYRcoa9v6rxKMJNnsHp84fPP5XYTDLbDoF9QqUkwFZxyFEDhCwkfqAXpo7KK9QBZF1ynuEiGpm9xIRzbLPjzCf74hFkTFzyZsTd9AlT8uPpBRRxnOMtg9h95TuiW9Zb-VeINctGvnBWizS7rNvNAJd2RKQt3wRTW8YC6u52oOV2AIYQrHUUw9u-r4mrTgRfMx5keX4fdL-dX8Mj5mUAlreU1w%3D%3D)
Biden and his allies will continue to lob attacks at us and try to silence us, and the media and Big Tech have already shown they’re on board. That means it’s up to us, the people, to stand up for our own rights. **Please, join me in defending this land of opportunity and preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.**
[_**Join me >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0578d7a273374dc6bb2eaede80a5519c&_e=T-njaDN68worJloO9vVatAihWzcAgroh_9oWIPqGbn2_lX9F3oCg8JfFtowN24-Qzq0I5Zj3HdXNmhDAKIQS_v95IAJw4xfG3N4jwc796sY6qBGmog4qSYS_nrJPoEtP3X-TCjx1pDrA9i-uFJM46bKLNsR6SXJrUVkB6nu2AU_cuZeuuz33vBDF-ifdDGYRe-T1wiBe5CaKYqS-kgiiMFab8rnf2ezpg9N6xikAn8_YLSUXoJZoLDlCAPSLc4zOu7psXySErlVAHJEbahVNBhV9GawxI4hZmtTdUb-4m9tuhg1PtAVALVH6d3BmC2cH-N-Mg7x-bLTiKqdz1xgGfgYlk0uvg6I0oJZvGRqb12eKaZD2L9HXh1Nx6MVmPktZKyjNTJAMHre6RLiaoX5O0g%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: | | Dear Peter, When conservatives across Missouri and our country saw what happened in our most recent elections - and the political class’s reluctance to give their own voters a hearing - I objected to the certification of the electoral college votes in Pennsylvania, despite pressure from both Democrats and Republicans. Pennsylvania wasn’t following their own state’s election law, but the establishment didn’t want to hear it. But that’s not who I work for. I objected because I wanted to make sure your voice was heard. Now, Biden and his woke mob are coming after me.I need your help. Before Biden even took office, he shamefully targeted me for voicing my concerns by comparing me to a Nazi. He went even farther saying I should be “flat beaten.” Talking heads in the media were also calling for my resignation, and “keyboard warriors” on Twitter were calling me a terrorist. Well, I have a message for them and for every special interest that wants me to shut up and ignore the truth: I will not back down. I ran for Senate with a promise to protect American values, not corporate greed or woke mobs. The challenges we face won’t be easy, but we have something more important than special interests or Hollywood cash - we have a desire to protect our future. If we do not stand up to the radical left we will get four years of lies, censorship, and America-last policies. Biden and his allies will continue to lob attacks at us and try to silence us, and the media and Big Tech have already shown they’re on board. That means it’s up to us, the people, to stand up for our own rights. Please, join me in defending this land of opportunity and preserving our values for generations of Americans to come. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. clean_body: This needs your attention TODAY 🚨🚨🚨 Friend, As a Governor, I know how important it is to have a Republican-led legislature in states like Iowa. Without Republicans in charge, Democrats will run our states amok, enacting dangerous policies like the Green New Deal and Socialized, State-Run Healthcare. We can't afford to let that happen in states like mine -- and that 's why I'm asking for your help. If we're going to keep our conservative state majorities in states like Iowa, we're going to have to make sure state Republicans have what they need to WIN in critical races across the country. All donations made by MIDNIGHT will be 3x MATCHED to help Republicans in the states WIN crucial races. == == == == == With Democrats controlling the House, the Senate, and the White House, it's absolutely crucial that we're able to hold on to our conservative state majorities. Because Friend, if we lose, we'll be giving up our entire country to radical Socialist control. == Thank you, == == Governor Kim Reynolds * To visit our website's about page, click ==. To make a secure, online contribution to support our critical mission, click ==. You can contribute via mail at the address below. Your input is critical to our success. Send us an email with your feedback: info@rslc.gop Connect with us on == and ==. Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004. This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
American workers are in trouble.

Friend, This is Ronny Jackson. I'm the former White House Chief Medical Advisor, a retired Navy Rear Admiral, and Congressman for Texas' 13th Congressional District - _**the top oil and gas district in the country.**_ Joe Biden has only been President for a few days, and he's already pushing to get rid of the fossil fuel industry COMPLETELY. **His plan calls for punishing companies that provide crucial oil and gas resources to our Country, as well as punishing American workers who are only trying to provide for their families.** I've been warning everyone for months now that Joe Biden would try to FORCE the "Green New Deal" on America if he became President, and now, that's exactly what he's planning to do. **I 'm working day and night to protect America's hard-working oil and gas employees, but I'm going to need your support, Friend. ** [**Help me stop Joe Biden 's America-LAST agenda, chip-in HERE and support my campaign to protect American Workers >>> [**CHIP-IN TODAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bSsuzdZlYtTLLYLxHsSE0O3NS8hEosu_LJT6PmXLJ-fTpyZoDW475Fa6eCROCJwRAz5wTYuAdukALOoZP6nJskwGp8nAz0iITc18ejFhs4-7sUss515gW3nZkOTfU7UhQ6uqZwe1VGi7HC3IMvB9vffW61Z3QaukuJaqMP76BGZkW-9bb-eaFw5hi70aypEjg2giqFZL5FwAUlOC8ZydzzvnEEYdJrhSNH3LaRAeKrzQSWm_1GYjLhhWgLALkCJAB6DL82U7sJl_rfIEgalqAMi44dlFEtv5aktBYoxrgEYVd4bCp2eCOl4yYT-VFE7i4g8EsoEocKcQAZKeoFs6JJ4ZHdB4ZZGthtetb1KuHYkucUUTo_WVNKdklrbOWzh8WMlbsxlA1dUJXgZAaxqLIFgQf212PFkzJaC7ac_lZb2JzjRhqZMDoAlN_cvdeTxVihbl3nlDU0=&c=ZVLTNbT7-Ff8piP_RhCxZQBeFANlA6x6FQK0VZf3wneq8FtmP0G2pA==&ch=_S6ja8ViO-g6TmdruonaE_sYI1jdOge1OGN-ZiQMfwY4o1DnmvEzQQ==) With everything going on in the world right now, the last thing we need to be focusing on is destroying American jobs. That's why I'm supporting our oil and gas professionals, and I WILL NOT sit idly by while Joe Biden tries to eliminate their jobs. name: Ann Wagner (Congresswoman MO-02)
subject: I’m counting on you, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress

name: Tim Scott
subject: The question that keeps me up at night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

_**Are we losing the American Dream?**_ This is the question that keeps me up at night.

As a conservative Black man from North Charleston, South Carolina whose family went from picking cotton to serving in Congress in one lifetime, I know that I have been blessed to live the American Dream.

But I'm worried future generations won't have the same opportunities to succeed.

If the Democrats get their way and pass a radical socialist agenda this year, our country will inevitably decline. That is why I'm doing everything in my power to stop them.

**[Friend, will you help me stop the Democrats and save the American Dream?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/save-the-american-dream/?utm_campaign=20210125_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046540-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210125_the-question-that-keeps-me-up-at-night/)

I need your help to remain a strong conservative voice in the Senate and stop the Democrats' socialist plans, which would ruin our country.**

I know Republicans like me are going to keep defending the American Dream. It is so important that we work together now, because we cannot give up any more ground.

[**Will you help me defend the American Dream by making a small donation today? **](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/save-the-american-dream/?utm_campaign=20210125_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046540-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210125_the-question-that-keeps-me-up-at-night/)

The future of our country --_for generations to come_ \-- could depend on what we do right now.

Tim Scott

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

body:

Friend,

Only hours in the White House, President Biden blocked the Keystone XL Pipeline. This will destroy thousands of jobs and skyrocket energy prices.

We must let this new administration know that we will not allow them to ruin American families' lives and devastate our energy jobs. Please take a few minutes to sign our petition to help Senator John Barrasso be the Republicans' voice and re-open the Keystone XL Pipeline.

name: Rick Scott
subject: The Dems want to divide us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are hoping that grassroots conservatives like you delete this message. If they get their way, it'll mean the destruction of the American way of life as we know it.
_**
First, Democrats took the Senate Majority.

Then, they rolled out a RADICAL agenda for America's future.

Now, they're wasting no time in forcing this agenda on the American people.**_

It's never been more CRITICAL for us to take back the Senate, Friend! With Democrats in charge, it's only a matter of time before our country opens its borders, raises taxes, and creates even harsher regulations and mandates that hurt our economy.

[**The best way we can stop the Radical Left and the march of socialism is if EVERY conservative reading this gives TODAY. Will you step up today, or will you let them win? The choice is yours.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210125_TY.100609_rick-scott_t1046526-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210125_the-dems-want-to-divide-us)

---

Democrats are hoping that grassroots conservatives like you delete this message. They want to divide Republicans so they can go unchecked in the systematic destruction of everything we accomplished together these past 4 years. Don't let them win!

With your help, we can start early and build a robust campaign operation to take on the Democrat Machine! We know we can't do it without you, which is why I'm personally reaching out to you today. [**Will you join the fight today to help us win back the Senate?**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210125_TY.100609_rick-scott_t1046526-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210125_the-dems-want-to-divide-us)

Rick Scott

name: Marco Rubio
subject: The GOP isn’t going anywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Despite the rhetoric from the liberal media, the GOP is the party that elected President Trump and provided a voice for the unheard and the forgotten.

Tens of millions of Americans still feel this economy isn't working for people like them, feel socially displaced and even like strangers in their own country.

**Donald Trump did not create those things. He got elected because of those things.**

Those factors and those feelings are still out there among tens of millions of Americans and they didn't leave when President Trump left on Wednesday. They're still there. That's why he got elected and it's what I hope we will continue to be the party of moving forward. __**[STAND WITH THE GOP>>> DONATE TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DAQmYejPBHeA7OFqWI01EqS_R3_dYw9q0MGPPyGgOsA30MAC_e3910HVyu7IY3bq5Py1igeqoQ4VU_RI_EtcFlWzN0ud4zrxXXmuXa4O17ld4-kvz9nKcZ5A-GDXwMxL-WPVIFGDkk1Z1ZtNBM-P7bPWzs7kTZqgk0Kf4M-NUsYEBZQSlS9WOlSwPTtjcL8BRxqCAD9vIwD0q4o1ZQLIj1uW_myd7ESOwkzUP36ZBB2X3fKfMKB9EUIm-uBjmpjK2itwHWtS5-NTdvKn5y4iVtTBfJJum2SlQid-C2bHH4pqlJkqifmj13ZRbhNIXFPVpjrd_rhZR5XeFwCFoO3JUolYXdicEvgOjZGatbeCa-v_yFtAoouqLhPDo85yYv4l35-yw8sqzGhQEMJFton7ZrxB4ZACWn4STVJWYvymBd8BJYp9422ERWFlsElUiZMSyqumKuqGRc4=&c=nyTKKzSaGjLzAZEnnau2XNUFfHUGp5JPp3dd2egJGusmSO_Pa7rlkg==&ch=ExEmdpMsbDMFCjOf4XCDXaYkI-p6jt97tdw8xZvVOY_h_A4zKFnb7A== "STAND WITH THE GOP")**__ Friend, I believe the future of the GOP is a multiethnic, multiracial, working-class coalition. I believe in a Republican Party that works to bring back jobs, make families stronger, and restore our communities. Ours cannot be a party that does the bidding of Wall Street, Big Business, or the Chinese Communist Party.

This is what I believe will be the future of our party and our country, Friend. _**[If you agree, I ask that you will join us and show your support with a donation of any kind today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DAQmYejPBHeA7OFqWI01EqS_R3_dYw9q0MGPPyGgOsA30MAC_e3910HVyu7IY3bq5Py1igeqoQ4VU_RI_EtcFlWzN0ud4zrxXXmuXa4O17ld4-kvz9nKcZ5A-GDXwMxL-WPVIFGDkk1Z1ZtNBM-P7bPWzs7kTZqgk0Kf4M-NUsYEBZQSlS9WOlSwPTtjcL8BRxqCAD9vIwD0q4o1ZQLIj1uW_myd7ESOwkzUP36ZBB2X3fKfMKB9EUIm-uBjmpjK2itwHWtS5-NTdvKn5y4iVtTBfJJum2SlQid-C2bHH4pqlJkqifmj13ZRbhNIXFPVpjrd_rhZR5XeFwCFoO3JUolYXdicEvgOjZGatbeCa-v_yFtAoouqLhPDo85yYv4l35-yw8sqzGhQEMJFton7ZrxB4ZACWn4STVJWYvymBd8BJYp9422ERWFlsElUiZMSyqumKuqGRc4=&c=nyTKKzSaGjLzAZEnnau2XNUFfHUGp5JPp3dd2egJGusmSO_Pa7rlkg==&ch=ExEmdpMsbDMFCjOf4XCDXaYkI-p6jt97tdw8xZvVOY_h_A4zKFnb7A== "If you agree")**_

With Democrats now in control of all 3 branches of government, your support is needed more than ever. We have an uphill struggle against the radical left and their socialist agenda, but with your help and the help of the other 75 million+ Americans, we can still preserve the conservative values of our country. _**[Make a donation of any kind HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DAQmYejPBHeA7OFqWI01EqS_R3_dYw9q0MGPPyGgOsA30MAC_e3910HVyu7IY3bq5Py1igeqoQ4VU_RI_EtcFlWzN0ud4zrxXXmuXa4O17ld4-kvz9nKcZ5A-GDXwMxL-WPVIFGDkk1Z1ZtNBM-P7bPWzs7kTZqgk0Kf4M-NUsYEBZQSlS9WOlSwPTtjcL8BRxqCAD9vIwD0q4o1ZQLIj1uW_myd7ESOwkzUP36ZBB2X3fKfMKB9EUIm-uBjmpjK2itwHWtS5-NTdvKn5y4iVtTBfJJum2SlQid-C2bHH4pqlJkqifmj13ZRbhNIXFPVpjrd_rhZR5XeFwCFoO3JUolYXdicEvgOjZGatbeCa-v_yFtAoouqLhPDo85yYv4l35-yw8sqzGhQEMJFton7ZrxB4ZACWn4STVJWYvymBd8BJYp9422ERWFlsElUiZMSyqumKuqGRc4=&c=nyTKKzSaGjLzAZEnnau2XNUFfHUGp5JPp3dd2egJGusmSO_Pa7rlkg==&ch=ExEmdpMsbDMFCjOf4XCDXaYkI-p6jt97tdw8xZvVOY_h_A4zKFnb7A== "HERE")**_ and support the future of the GOP and our country.

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name to support the Dream Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
I am pleased to report that one of President Biden's first official actions upon taking office last week was to restore the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals -- or DACA -- program that hundreds of thousands of Dreamers rely on in Illinois and across the country.
DACA is a lifeline -- but it's only a first step. I have been working to pass the Dream Act for two decades now, and I am making it my top priority again in the new Democratic-led Senate.
**[It's time to give Dreamers permanent protections and a path to citizenship. I'm fighting to pass the Dream Act -- can I count on your support as a citizen co-sponsor? Sign on now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff47a7/42ab3cf4/66fb207c/135de9cc/3939234965/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-dream-act?source=em210124i_1156&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Dreamers were brought to this country as children -- and they have made their lives here in America as parents, teachers, essential workers, little league coaches, neighbors, and friends.
They should never have to fear being deported from the only home they have ever known.
That's why it is urgent that Congress takes immediate action to permanently protect Dreamers.
**[Will you become a citizen co-sponsor in support of the Dream Act? Add your name now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff47a7/42ab3cf4/66fb207c/135de9cc/3939234965/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-dream-act?source=em210124i_1156&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: Peter, I am pleased to report that one of President Biden's first official actions upon taking office last week was to restore the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals -- or DACA -- program that hundreds of thousands of Dreamers rely on in Illinois and across the country. DACA is a lifeline -- but it's only a first step. I have been working to pass the Dream Act for two decades now, and I am making it my top priority again in the new Democratic-led Senate. "" Dreamers were brought to this country as children -- and they have made their lives here in America as parents, teachers, essential workers, little league coaches, neighbors, and friends. They should never have to fear being deported from the only home they have ever known. That's why it is urgent that Congress takes immediate action to permanently protect Dreamers. "" My best, Dick Durbin "" * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Friend,
We are quickly approaching Congressman Van Drew's end of month fundraising deadline, and this may be one of our biggest. Congressman Van Drew is fighting for Conservatives across America and we need to show our support for him.
The Socialist agenda being pushed by the Radical Left is unacceptable. Under the Biden Administration, policies like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and Defunding the Police could become a reality. In just the first week, we've already seen massive job losses, and if we don't fight back now, we could lose even more! **Friend, Congressman Van Drew believes we can NOT let these disastrous policies go unchallenged.**
Help Congressman Jeff Van Drew reach his first fundraising goal of the new year so that our team has the resources to fight back.

name: John Fetterman
subject: All I can say is THANK YOU!!! 🥳🤯
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re closing in on $1.1 million raised since I first talked about running for Senate. Gisele and I are *literally* overwhelmed.
#
WOOOOOW, Peter. 🥳
We’re closing in on $1.1 million raised since I first talked about running for U.S. Senate. **All I can say is****THANK YOU!!!**
Gisele and I are *literally* overwhelmed (and so is Levi 🐶). Ninety-nine percent of our donations are $200 or less, and the majority of donors are from Pennsylvania. This is really grassroots, Peter. I mean honestly.**He****re’s where we’re at:**
✅ 33,000 donations
✅ $32 average donation
✅ And contributions from all 67 counties in Pennsylvania
[**Can we count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can right now, to keep up the momentum? We’ve got a *lot* of work to do, and every contribution we receive this early helps our campaign start off in the strongest position possible.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/964?refcode=em20210125-62&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=62%2E434096%2EUjvhm9)
**[Chip in $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/964?refcode=em20210125-62&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=62%2E434096%2EUjvhm9)**
Look, Pennsylvania is going to be the most *important* Senate race of 2022 — and we’re doing this in a way that respects each other. As my amazing wife says: You help make the world feel a little smaller when it can feel so big and lonely.
**So again, THANK. YOU. SO. MUCH. 😭🙏**
See you out there,
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. It may seem early, but *every* bit of early support goes a LONG way when you’re planning a run for U.S. Senate. [**If you’re on board, please contribute $5, or anything you can, to grow our campaign early on.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/964?refcode=em20210125-62&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=62%2E434096%2EUjvhm9)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210125-62-footer&t=4&refcode2=62_434096_Ujvhm9&akid=62%2E434096%2EUjvhm9)**

Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=62%2E434096%2EUjvhm9).
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211
clean_body: We’re closing in on $1.1 million raised since I first talked about running for Senate. Gisele and I are literally overwhelmed. WOOOOOW, Peter. 🥳 We’re closing in on $1.1 million raised since I first talked about running for U.S. Senate. All I can say isTHANK YOU!!! Gisele and I are literally overwhelmed (and so is Levi 🐶). Ninety-nine percent of our donations are $200 or less, and the majority of donors are from Pennsylvania. This is really grassroots, Peter. I mean honestly.Here’s where we’re at: ✅ 33,000 donations ✅ $32 average donation ✅ And contributions from all 67 counties in Pennsylvania Look, Pennsylvania is going to be the most important Senate race of 2022 — and we’re doing this in a way that respects each other. As my amazing wife says: You help make the world feel a little smaller when it can feel so big and lonely. So again, THANK. YOU. SO. MUCH. 😭🙏 See you out there, John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. It may seem early, but every bit of early support goes a LONG way when you’re planning a run for U.S. Senate. | | Paid for by Fetterman for PA

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: 2021 Forecast: Four Fights to Watch
body:
A new president was sworn in and despite our differences, we wish him well. President Biden has signaled he’ll embark on an ambitious agenda. Here are four fights we’ll be closely watching...

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 25, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21911&F=H&) | **[U.S. Blows $54 Billion on Wasteful Projects; Smart Toilets, Hot Tub Study, Edible Marijuana Survey](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21911&F=H&)** The year ended with a record-breaking $3.1 trillion deficit and, as usual, the U.S. government managed to blow tens of billions on a myriad of wasteful projects that should provoke outrage among tax-paying Americans. The area of healthcare takes the prize with nearly $4 billion in questionable government-funded programs that include multi-million-dollar studies on the connection between stress and gray hair, edible marijuana consumption among San Francisco baby boomers and “smart toilets,” to name a few. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21911&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi8yMDIxLWZvcmVjYXN0LWZvdXItZmlnaHRzLXRvLXdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjUyMjE5Mzc=) | **[2021 Forecast: Four Fights to Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi8yMDIxLWZvcmVjYXN0LWZvdXItZmlnaHRzLXRvLXdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjUyMjE5Mzc=)** Biden immediately threw down the gauntlet with a big move on immigration. He announced plans to send to Congress a sweeping immigration bill that includes far-reaching amnesty provisions, a fast track for Dreamers, expanded access to the United States, and whiffs on border security. Conservative rejection was swift. “A mass amnesty with no safeguards and no strings attached is a nonstarter,” said Senator Chuck Grassley. Biden signed a flurry of first-day executive actions, including rescinding the travel ban, rolling back immigration enforcement, and halting construction on the border wall. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi8yMDIxLWZvcmVjYXN0LWZvdXItZmlnaHRzLXRvLXdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjUyMjE5Mzc=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21846&F=H&) | **[Biden Senior Advisor Ranked Mao Zedong Among “Favorite Political Philosophers”](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21846&F=H&)** In a scary preview of what lies ahead, a cherished senior advisor to President Joe Biden ranked murderous Communist dictator Mao Zedong among her “favorite political philosophers.” The egregious admission actually forced the veteran political operative, Anita Dunn, to resign as Obama’s White House communications director over a decade ago and now she’s back along with a lengthy roster of leftist officials who served under the 44th president. Dunn sticks out among the group because she publicly praised the Chinese Communist revolutionary responsible for killing tens of millions and it was caught on video. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21846&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21912&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2ltcGVhY2htZW50LTFzdC1hbWVuZG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyNTIyMTkzNw==) | **[Impeachment & The Attack on the First Amendment](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21912&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2ltcGVhY2htZW50LTFzdC1hbWVuZG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyNTIyMTkzNw==)** The articles of impeachment which charged the President with the “incitement of insurrection” were part of an attempt to “outlaw and criminalize concerns about the election,” Fitton argued. Denying the President an opportunity to defend himself before the House vote, “impeachment is now the equivalent of a resolution,” he continued. “We have political figures in control of our government who don’t care about the civil liberties of their political opponents.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21912&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2ltcGVhY2htZW50LTFzdC1hbWVuZG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyNTIyMTkzNw==)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [FBI feared foreign power was targeting money to Clinton before 2016 campaign, memos show ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21913&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanVzdC10aGUtbmV3cy1jbGludG9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjUyMjE5Mzc=) Just the News FBI agents opened an investigation in late 2014 into a foreign power’s effort to curry influence with Hillary Clinton’s prospective presidential campaign through donations, but the bureau’s leadership slow-walked a surveillance warrant and instead arranged for the candidate to get a defensive briefing, newly declassified memos show. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21913&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanVzdC10aGUtbmV3cy1jbGludG9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjUyMjE5Mzc=)
---
### [A China-based firm scored a $1B N95 mask contract with California. A document trove shows how. ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21914&F=H&) Fox News California Gov. Gavin Newsom held back details from the public and lawmakers about a $990 million state N95 mask contract with a China-based firm scrutinized by Congress.

But now, a trove of 848 pages of documents is available to the public, obtained by government watchdog group Judicial Watch. The documents provide details on how the California Governor’s Office of Emergency Services selected BYD to make 300 million face masks for protection against COVID-19, a virus that originated in Wuhan. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21914&F=H&)
---
### [DOJ Must Appoint a Special Counsel to Investigate Evidence of Biden Family Corruption ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21865&F=H&) Judicial Watch There is substantial evidence, from documents and witness statements, that the Biden family, including President Joe Biden, may have been involved in criminal activity involving, among other issues, foreign entities tied to Ukraine and China. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52714&L=21865&F=H&)

---

clean_body: A new president was sworn in and despite our differences, we wish him well. President Biden has signaled he’ll embark on an ambitious agenda. Here are four fights we’ll be closely watching... | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 25, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The year ended with a record-breaking $3.1 trillion deficit and, as usual, the U.S. government managed to blow tens of billions on a myriad of wasteful projects that should provoke outrage among tax-paying Americans. The area of healthcare takes the prize with nearly $4 billion in questionable government-funded programs that include multi-million-dollar studies on the connection between stress and gray hair, edible marijuana consumption among San Francisco baby boomers and “smart toilets,” to name a few. ---|--- | | | | = | = Biden immediately threw down the gauntlet with a big move on immigration. He announced plans to send to Congress a sweeping immigration bill that includes far-reaching amnesty provisions, a fast track for Dreamers, expanded access to the United States, and whiffs on border security. Conservative rejection was swift. “A mass amnesty with no safeguards and no strings attached is a nonstarter,” said Senator Chuck Grassley. Biden signed a flurry of first-day executive actions, including rescinding the travel ban, rolling back immigration enforcement, and halting construction on the border wall. = ---|--- | | | | | In a scary preview of what lies ahead, a cherished senior advisor to President Joe Biden ranked murderous Communist dictator Mao Zedong among her “favorite political philosophers.” The egregious admission actually forced the veteran political operative, Anita Dunn, to resign as Obama’s White House communications director over a decade ago and now she’s back along with a lengthy roster of leftist officials who served under the 44th president. Dunn sticks out among the group because she publicly praised the Chinese Communist revolutionary responsible for killing tens of millions and it was caught on video. ---|--- | | | | == | == The articles of impeachment which charged the President with the “incitement of insurrection” were part of an attempt to “outlaw and criminalize concerns about the election,” Fitton argued. Denying the President an opportunity to defend himself before the House vote, “impeachment is now the equivalent of a resolution,” he continued. “We have political figures in control of our government who don’t care about the civil liberties of their political opponents.” == ---|--- | | | = Just the News FBI agents opened an investigation in late 2014 into a foreign power’s effort to curry influence with Hillary Clinton’s prospective presidential campaign through donations, but the bureau’s leadership slow-walked a surveillance warrant and instead arranged for the candidate to get a defensive briefing, newly declassified memos show. = Fox News California Gov. Gavin Newsom held back details from the public and lawmakers about a $990 million state N95 mask contract with a China-based firm scrutinized by Congress. But now, a trove of 848 pages of documents is available to the public, obtained by government watchdog group Judicial Watch. The documents provide details on how the California Governor’s Office of Emergency Services selected BYD to make 300 million face masks for protection against COVID-19, a virus that originated in Wuhan. Judicial Watch There is substantial evidence, from documents and witness statements, that the Biden family, including President Joe Biden, may have been involved in criminal activity involving, among other issues, foreign entities tied to Ukraine and China. = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |
